page_metadata.biotools__summary: Open-source tool for adding ontology term selection to Excel spreadsheets. It is used by a 'Template Creator' to create semantically aware Excel spreadsheet templates. The Excel templates are then reused by Scientists to collect and annotate their data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Open-source tool for adding ontology term selection to Excel spreadsheets. It is used by a 'Template Creator' to create semantically aware Excel spreadsheet templates. The Excel templates are then reused by Scientists to collect and annotate their data.
